nodes.name: New Trip Email
nodes.notes: Polls every minute for unread STR trip emails. Independent trigger — does NOT share state with the Google workflow.

nodes.name: Dedup Emails
nodes.notes: Independent dedup — separate static data from Google workflow

nodes.name: Parse Email
nodes.notes: Parses request type (New/Modified/Cancelled/Follow-up), Confirm ID, and Trip Code

nodes.name: Skip PDF?
nodes.notes: Cancelled/Follow-up → minimal row. New/Modified → full PDF pipeline.

nodes.name: Get Attachments
nodes.notes: Fetches email attachments from Microsoft Graph

nodes.name: Send to SharePoint Processor
nodes.notes: Sends to the SharePoint Render service. Processor fetches HTML, runs Puppeteer, extracts PDF, uploads to SharePoint.

nodes.name: Log Trip Fields
nodes.notes: Logs extracted trip data for monitoring

nodes.name: Format Excel Row
nodes.notes: Builds full 28-column row for SharePoint Excel. Uses sharePointUrl as pdfLink.

nodes.name: Write to SharePoint Excel
nodes.notes: Appends row to SharePoint Excel TripDetails table via Render /append-row endpoint

nodes.name: Mark Processed
nodes.notes: Stores processed messageId in this workflow's static data

nodes.name: Processing Failed
nodes.notes: Logs error details. Email stays unread for retry on next poll.
